title: While Slay the Spire 2 is still brewing, grab eight great deckbuilders for a huge 88% off
author: editor@pcgamesn.com
contents:
Slay the Spire blew up the moment people realized it had basically reinvented two genres at once. It took the satisfying crunch of deck-building (where every card you add - or don't add - matters) and stitched it to a roguelike structure that made every run feel completely different. It's no wonder that so many people, myself included, are eagerly awaiting the sequel, but since the Slay the Spire 2 release date isn't likely to be until late 2026, we'll have to find other ways to occupy ourselves - like the Decious Deckbuilders 2 Humble Bundle.

Read the rest of the story...
